raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need to read file list, sum sizes. Use xargs -d '\n' -I{} stat -c %s {} and sum. Or use awk. Command: awk '{sum+=($1?`stat -c %s "$1"`:0)} END{print sum}'? But simpler: cat files.txt | xargs -d '\n' -I{} stat -c %s {} | awk '{s+=$1} END{print s}'. One line.
